title: phlomoides koraiensis
intro: Phlomoides koraiensis, also known as Korean lavender, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Phlomoides koraiensis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. In herbal preparations, Phlomoides koraiensis is often used in teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or inhaled to harness its therapeutic effects.
